entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: Cultivated yield elite pigeonpea lines (Cajanus cajan) studied for genetic diversity and pest resistance

entities.name: POD BORER
entities.description: A pest that attacks pigeonpea pods

entities.name: KENYA
entities.description: The country where the field evaluation of pigeonpea genotypes was conducted

entities.name: SIMPLE SEQUENCE REPEAT
entities.description: A type of molecular marker (SSR) used to assess genetic diversity

entities.name: GENETIC DIVERSITY
entities.description: The variation in genetic information among the pigeonpea genotypes

entities.name: POD BORER RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of pigeonpea genotypes to withstand attack by pod borer

entities.name: CCM1820
entities.description: A specific SSR marker that revealed the highest number of alleles and PIC value

entities.name: NEIGHBOR JOINING
entities.description: A clustering method used to group genotypes based on marker data

entities.name: ICEAP 01541
entities.description: A pigeonpea genotype that revealed tolerance to pod borer

entities.name: ICEAP 01154-2
entities.description: A pigeonpea genotype that revealed tolerance to pod borer

entities.name: ICEAP 00902
entities.description: A pigeonpea genotype that revealed tolerance to pod borer

entities.name: ICEAP 00068
entities.description: A maternal parent used to develop several pigeonpea genotypes

entities.name: ICPL 87091
entities.description: A maternal parent used to develop several pigeonpea genotypes

entities.name: POLYMORPHISM INFORMATION CONTENT
entities.description: A measure (PIC) used to evaluate the informativeness of genetic markers

entities.name: MORPHOLOGICAL DATA
entities.description: Quality data used alongside molecular markers to choose breeding parents

entities.name: APPLIED BREEDING
entities.description: The process of improving crop varieties through selection and crossing
